summary: Iteration 247 - Sovereign Dashboard & Skeleton Export Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working after fixing route conflict. The SovereignDashboard was shadowed by SovereignArchitecture on the same /sovereign route - fixed by changing SovereignDashboard route to /sovereign-admin.
action_items: IMPORTANT: Route conflict fixed - SovereignDashboard now accessible at /sovereign-admin instead of /sovereign (which shows SovereignArchitecture)
Consider updating Dashboard.js navigation link to point to /sovereign-admin if admin access is needed from dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: App.js had duplicate /sovereign routes - line 329 (SovereignArchitecture) and line 345 (SovereignDashboard). Changed SovereignDashboard to /sovereign-admin
treasury.py: Sovereign config CRUD working correctly with fee_percent validation (0-50 range)
treasury.py line 115-116: frozen_transactions check returns 423 when transactions are frozen
treasury.py line 324-376: skeleton/export endpoint returns clean JSON with framework, module_types, affinities, tier_levels, interaction_model, class_archetypes
constellations.py line 57-75: Mirror hook respects mirror_active config toggle
SovereignDashboard.js: Well-structured with 5 tabs (Overview, Controls, Mirror, Escrow, Export), all with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Test constellations created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 247 verified: (1) Sovereign Dashboard accessible at /sovereign-admin (NOT /sovereign which shows SovereignArchitecture). (2) Backend APIs all working: GET/PATCH /api/treasury/sovereign/config, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/mirror, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/escrow, POST /api/treasury/sovereign/freeze/{id}, GET /api/treasury/skeleton/export. (3) Fee slider (0-25%) persists to backend. (4) Toggle switches for is_live, mirror_active, frozen_transactions all working. (5) Skeleton export generates JSON with framework metadata. (6) frozen_transactions=true blocks purchases with 423. (7) fee_percent validation rejects values > 50 or < 0.

backend_sovereign_config_get.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/config returns fee_percent, is_live, mirror_active, frozen_transactions

backend_sovereign_config_patch.details: PATCH /api/treasury/sovereign/config updates fee_percent and toggles correctly

backend_sovereign_config_validation.details: Fee validation rejects > 50 and < 0 with 400 status

backend_sovereign_mirror.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/mirror returns entries list with total count

backend_skeleton_export.details: GET /api/treasury/skeleton/export returns framework, skeleton (module_types, affinity_tags, tier_levels, interaction_model), class_archetypes

frontend_sovereign_route.details: /sovereign-admin route loads SovereignDashboard page (fixed from /sovereign which was shadowed)

frontend_overview_tab.details: Overview tab shows Treasury balance, Fees Collected, Wallets, Escrow stats

frontend_controls_tab.details: Controls tab shows fee slider (0-25%) and toggle switches (System Live, Mirror Hook, Freeze All Trades)

frontend_fee_slider.details: Fee slider changes value and persists to backend

frontend_mirror_tab.details: Mirror tab shows sovereign mirror entries

frontend_export_tab.details: Export tab shows skeleton download button and JSON preview

route_fix_applied.issue: Duplicate /sovereign routes in App.js - SovereignArchitecture (line 329) shadowed SovereignDashboard (line 345)
